```{.tikz}
%%| width: 60%

\newcommand{\hextri}[3][]{%
\begin{scope}[shift={#2}]
\foreach \i in {1,...,6} {
\coordinate (v\i) at ({(\i-1)*-60+90}:0.5);
% \node[white] at ({(\i-1)*-60+90}:0.6) {\tiny\i};
}
\foreach \a/\b/\style in {#3} {
\draw[white,\style] (v\a)--(v\b);
}
    \ifx\\#1\\\else\coordinate (#1) at (0,0);\fi
\draw[white] (v1)--(v2)--(v3)--(v4)--(v5)--(v6)--cycle;
\end{scope}
}
\begin{tikzpicture}[thick]
\hextri[1]{(0,-3.5)}{1/3/Goldenrod,3/5/Magenta,1/5/Cyan};

\hextri[4]{(0,-1.5)}{1/3/Goldenrod,1/4/Magenta,1/5/Cyan};

\hextri[2]{(-3,-2.5)}{1/5/Cyan,2/5/Magenta,3/5/Goldenrod};
\hextri[3]{(3,-2.5)}{1/3/Goldenrod,3/5/Cyan,3/6/Magenta};

\hextri[5]{(-4,.25)}{1/5/Cyan,2/5/Magenta,2/4/Goldenrod};
\hextri[10]{(4,.25)}{1/3/Goldenrod,3/6/Magenta,4/6/Cyan};

\hextri[7]{(-1,0)}{2/6/Cyan,2/5/Magenta,3/5/Goldenrod};
\hextri[8]{(1,0)}{2/6/Cyan,3/6/Magenta,3/5/Goldenrod};

\hextri[6]{(-2.5,0)}{1/5/Cyan,1/4/Magenta,2/4/Goldenrod};
\hextri[9]{(2.5,0)}{1/3/Goldenrod,1/4/Magenta,4/6/Cyan};

\hextri[13]{(3,2.5)}{2/6/Goldenrod,3/6/Magenta,4/6/Cyan};
\hextri[12]{(-3,2.5)}{2/6/Cyan,2/4/Goldenrod,2/5/Magenta};

\hextri[11]{(0,1.5)}{1/4/Cyan,2/4/Goldenrod,6/4/Magenta};

\hextri[14]{(0,3.5)}{2/6/Cyan,2/4/Goldenrod,4/6/Magenta};

\foreach \i/\j/\col/\dot in {
1/2//,
1/3//,
1/4/very thick/Magenta,
2/5/very thick/Goldenrod,
2/7/dotted/Cyan,
4/6/very thick/Goldenrod,
4/9/very thick/Cyan,
3/8/dotted/,
3/10/very thick/Cyan,
5/6/very thick/Magenta,
5/12/,
6/11/,
7/8/dotted/Magenta,
7/12/dotted/Goldenrod,
8/13//dotted,
9/11,
9/10/very thick/Magenta,
10/13/very thick/Goldenrod,
11/14/very thick/Cyan,
12/14/very thick/Magenta,
13/14}{
\draw[white, shorten >=0.6cm, shorten <=0.6cm, \col,\dot] (\i)--(\j);
}
\end{tikzpicture}

```
